member.name: T:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ExtensionReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from extension.proto

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ExtensionReflection.Descriptor
member.summary: File descriptor for extension.proto

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.ConfigFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "config" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.Config
member.summary: Contains configuration items that are served as necessary context information for completing the resource operation. This is the user-supplied extension configuration in the Bicep or ARM template file. Formatted as a serialized JSON string.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.HasConfig
member.summary: Gets whether the "config" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.ClearConfig
member.summary: Clears the value of the "config" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.TypeFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "type" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.Type
member.summary: The type of the resource.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.ApiVersionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "apiVersion" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.ApiVersion
member.summary: The API version of the resource.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.HasApiVersion
member.summary: Gets whether the "apiVersion" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.ClearApiVersion
member.summary: Clears the value of the "apiVersion" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.PropertiesFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "properties" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceSpecification.Properties
member.summary: The properties of the resource. Formatted as a serialized JSON string.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.IdentifiersFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "identifiers" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.Identifiers
member.summary: An object comprising key properties that, when paired with the resource's type and configuration, uniquely identify a resource. These properties are generally a subset of the resource properties provided in the createOrUpdate request payload. Formatted as a serialized JSON string.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.ConfigFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "config" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.Config
member.summary: Contains configuration items that are served as necessary context information for completing the resource operation. This is the user-supplied extension configuration in the Bicep or ARM template file. Formatted as a serialized JSON string.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.HasConfig
member.summary: Gets whether the "config" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.ClearConfig
member.summary: Clears the value of the "config" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.TypeFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "type" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.Type
member.summary: The type of the resource.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.ApiVersionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "apiVersion" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.ApiVersion
member.summary: The API version of the resource.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.HasApiVersion
member.summary: Gets whether the "apiVersion" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ResourceReference.ClearApiVersion
member.summary: Clears the value of the "apiVersion" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.LocalExtensibilityOperationResponse.ResourceFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "resource" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.LocalExtensibilityOperationResponse.Resource
member.summary: The resource data if the operation succeeded.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.LocalExtensibilityOperationResponse.ErrorDataFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "errorData" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.LocalExtensibilityOperationResponse.ErrorData
member.summary: Error information if the operation failed.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.TypeFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "type" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.Type
member.summary: The type of the resource.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.ApiVersionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "apiVersion" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.ApiVersion
member.summary: The API version of the resource.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.HasApiVersion
member.summary: Gets whether the "apiVersion" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.ClearApiVersion
member.summary: Clears the value of the "apiVersion" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.IdentifiersFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "identifiers" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.Identifiers
member.summary: An object comprising key properties that, when paired with the resource's type and configuration, uniquely identify a resource. These properties are generally a subset of the resource properties provided in the createOrUpdate request payload. Formatted as a serialized JSON string.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.PropertiesFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "properties" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.Properties
member.summary: The properties of the resource. Formatted as a serialized JSON string.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.StatusFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "status" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.Status
member.summary: Indicates the provisioning status of the resource or long-running operation. There are three terminal status: Succeeded, Failed, and Canceled. A null or undefined status property is treated as Succeeded. Any other status is a non-terminal state and is defined by each extension (e.g., Running).

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.HasStatus
member.summary: Gets whether the "status" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Resource.ClearStatus
member.summary: Clears the value of the "status" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorData.ErrorFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "error" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorData.Error
member.summary: The error details.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.CodeFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "code" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.Code
member.summary: A short unlocalized string which can be used to identify a particular class of error. The code should be Pascal-cased.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.TargetFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "target" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.Target
member.summary: An absolute JSON Pointer (see RFC 6901) to the property causing the error.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.HasTarget
member.summary: Gets whether the "target" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.ClearTarget
member.summary: Clears the value of the "target" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.MessageFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "message" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.Message
member.summary: Describes the error in detail and provides debugging information. If the Accept-Language header is set in the request, it must be localized accordingly.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.DetailsFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "details" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.Details
member.summary: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.InnerErrorFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "innerError" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.InnerError
member.summary: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.HasInnerError
member.summary: Gets whether the "innerError" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.Error.ClearInnerError
member.summary: Clears the value of the "innerError" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.CodeFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "code" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.Code
member.summary: A short unlocalized string which can be used to identify a particular class of error. The code should be Pascal-cased.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.TargetFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "target" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.Target
member.summary: An absolute JSON Pointer (see RFC 6901) to the property causing the error.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.HasTarget
member.summary: Gets whether the "target" field is set

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.ClearTarget
member.summary: Clears the value of the "target" field

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.MessageFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "message" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.ErrorDetail.Message
member.summary: Describes the error in detail and provides debugging information. If the Accept-Language header is set in the request, it must be localized accordingly.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.TypeFilesResponse.IndexFileFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "indexFile" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.TypeFilesResponse.IndexFile
member.summary: Path to the main index file for type definitions.

member.name: F:Bicep.Local.Rpc.TypeFilesResponse.TypeFilesFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "typeFiles" field.

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.TypeFilesResponse.TypeFiles
member.summary: Map of file paths to their contents (all type definition files).

member.name: P:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.Descriptor
member.summary: Service descriptor

member.name: T:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BicepExtensionBase
member.summary: Base class for server-side implementations of BicepExtension

member.summary: Create or update a resource.
member.param: The request received from the client.
The context of the server-side call handler being invoked.
member.returns: The response to send back to the client (wrapped by a task).

member.param: The request received from the client.
The context of the server-side call handler being invoked.
member.returns: The response to send back to the client (wrapped by a task).

member.summary: Health check endpoint to verify extension availability.

member.name: T:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BicepExtensionClient
member.summary: Client for BicepExtension

member.summary: Creates a new client for BicepExtension
member.param: The channel to use to make remote calls.

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BicepExtensionClient.#ctor(Grpc.Core.CallInvoker)
member.summary: Creates a new client for BicepExtension that uses a custom CallInvoker.
member.param: The callInvoker to use to make remote calls.

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BicepExtensionClient.#ctor
member.summary: Protected parameterless constructor to allow creation of test doubles.

member.summary: Protected constructor to allow creation of configured clients.
member.param: The client configuration.

member.summary: Create or update a resource.
member.param: The request to send to the server.
The initial metadata to send with the call. This parameter is optional.
An optional deadline for the call. The call will be cancelled if deadline is hit.
An optional token for canceling the call.
member.returns: The response received from the server.

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BindService(Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BicepExtensionBase)
member.summary: Creates service definition that can be registered with a server
member.param: An object implementing the server-side handling logic.

member.name: M:Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BindService(Grpc.Core.ServiceBinderBase,Bicep.Local.Rpc.BicepExtension.BicepExtensionBase)
member.summary: Register service method with a service binder with or without implementation. Useful when customizing the service binding logic. Note: this method is part of an experimental API that can change or be removed without any prior notice.
member.param: Service methods will be bound by calling AddMethod on this object.
An object implementing the server-side handling logic.
